notifications.note: Simulated until native notification bridge exists

storage.note: File picker unavailable until native permission flow exists

intents.note: URL validation only until native intent bridge exists

haptics.note: Simulated until native haptics bridge exists

media.description: Camera and microphone (unavailable until native permission flow)
media.note: UNAVAILABLE — requires native Android permission flow

location.description: GPS and location (unavailable until native permission flow)
location.note: UNAVAILABLE — requires native Android permission flow

notes: This contract defines ONE internal API bridge for TerminAI.
This replaces the split Termux:API companion app pattern.
All capabilities are simulated until native Android runtime connects.
Camera, microphone, and location are blocked until native permission flow exists.
Every invocation is audited to terminai_api_audit.jsonl.
No arbitrary shell commands are executed through this bridge.
